events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: an unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers inside is an immediate cave-in hazard under OSHA 1926 Subpart P — this is a stop-work condition (decision: `fail`, risk: `critical`). Required immediate actions: pull workers out, barricade the trench, have a competent person classify the soil, install a protective system (sloping/benching or shoring/shielding), and ensure compliant egress and spoil placement before any re-entry.
